rationale: The proposed homestead exemption increase under Tax Code §11.13(b) has no relation to Elec. Code §276.017, which governs unlawful distribution of early voting ballots by election officials.
quote: The early voting clerk or other election official commits an offense if the clerk or official knowingly mails or otherwise provides an early voting ballot by mail
_note: No conflict; the rule_text concerns election ballot distribution and is unrelated to property tax homestead exemptions.
